description: Mock AssemblyAI streaming payload. Replayed at realtime speed when MOCK_ASSEMBLYAI=true.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Hey, how have you been? It's been a while.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: I've been great actually. Just got back from Tokyo last week. Amazing trip.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: No way, I've always wanted to go. What were you doing there?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Work trip mostly, but I managed to squeeze in a few days of sightseeing. The food was incredible. I'm actually thinking of moving there next year.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: That's a big move. What does your company think about that?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: They're actually opening a Tokyo office so the timing is perfect. My wife is on board too which is the main thing. We've been talking about it for months.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Wow that's exciting. When are you thinking?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Probably Q2 next year. We need to sort out visas and find a place but it's looking realistic. I'm really excited about it.
